drug_1_dosage: 150mg — take 1 tablet once a day
drug_2_dosage: Apply a small amount on the affected area 2 times a day
drug_3_dosage: Take 1 tablet once a day
regimen_notes: Complete the full course even if symptoms improve. Keep affected area clean and dry.

drug_1_dosage: 10mg — take 1 tablet once a day at night
drug_2_dosage: Apply a thin layer on the itchy area 2 times a day
drug_3_dosage: 500mg — take 1 tablet once a day
regimen_notes: Use Hydrocortisone cream on skin only. Avoid known allergy triggers.

drug_1_dosage: 20mg — take 1 capsule 2 times a day 30 minutes before eating
drug_2_dosage: Take 2 teaspoons after every meal 3 times a day
drug_3_dosage: 10mg — take 1 tablet before every meal 3 times a day
regimen_notes: Avoid spicy food and alcohol. Do not lie down immediately after eating.

drug_1_dosage: 300mg — take 1 tablet 2 times a day morning and night
drug_2_dosage: 4g — mix 1 sachet in a full glass of water and drink 2 times a day
drug_3_dosage: 10mg — take 1 tablet once a day
interaction_warning: Take Cholestyramine and Vitamin K at least 4 hours apart
regimen_notes: Regular liver function tests required.

drug_1_dosage: 40mg — take 2 tablets once a day in the morning
drug_2_dosage: 10mg — take 1 tablet once a day at night
drug_3_dosage: Apply a thin layer on the affected skin 2 times a day
regimen_notes: Stop the drug that caused the reaction immediately.

drug_1_dosage: 20mg — take 1 capsule 2 times a day morning and night before eating
drug_2_dosage: 500mg — take 1 capsule 3 times a day morning afternoon and night
drug_3_dosage: 400mg — take 1 tablet 2 times a day morning and night
regimen_notes: This is triple therapy. Do not take alcohol with Metronidazole. Complete all three drugs together.

drug_1_dosage: 300mg — take 1 tablet once a day at exactly the same time every day
drug_2_dosage: 150mg — take 1 tablet 2 times a day morning and night
drug_3_dosage: 600mg — take 1 tablet once a day at night before sleeping
drug_4_dosage: 960mg — take 1 tablet once a day as prophylaxis
interaction_warning: Tenofovir requires regular kidney function monitoring
regimen_notes: Never stop ARVs without doctor advice. Collect drugs every month.

drug_1_dosage: 500mg — take 1 tablet 2 times a day with food morning and night
drug_2_dosage: 5mg — take 1 tablet once a day in the morning before breakfast
drug_3_dosage: 500mcg — take 1 tablet once a day
interaction_warning: Metformin is not safe with kidney disease — stop it if kidneys are weak
regimen_notes: Monitor blood sugar daily. Eat regularly to avoid low sugar. Metformin must be stopped before surgery or CT scan with dye.

drug_1_dosage: Mix 1 sachet in 1 cup of clean water — drink 1 cup after every loose stool
drug_2_dosage: 20mg — take 1 tablet once a day
drug_3_dosage: 400mg — take 1 tablet 3 times a day morning afternoon and night
regimen_notes: ORS is the most important treatment — never stop it.

drug_1_dosage: Take 2 puffs every 4 to 6 hours when you feel short of breath — shake well before use
drug_1_duration: Use as needed — keep with you always
drug_2_dosage: 100mcg — take 2 puffs 2 times a day morning and night — this is a preventer
drug_2_duration: Use daily even when feeling well
drug_3_dosage: 40mg — take 2 tablets once a day in the morning during severe attacks only
regimen_notes: Never stop the preventer inhaler even when feeling well. Rinse mouth after using Beclomethasone. Avoid smoke and dust.

drug_1_dosage: 5mg — take 1 tablet once a day in the morning
drug_2_dosage: 12.5mg — take 1 tablet once a day in the morning
drug_3_dosage: 5mg — take 1 tablet 2 times a day morning and night
interaction_warning: Hydrochlorothiazide and Enalapril together can lower potassium — eat bananas and greens regularly
regimen_notes: Never stop blood pressure drugs suddenly. Check blood pressure weekly. Reduce salt in food.

drug_1_dosage: 50mg — take 1 tablet as soon as the headache starts
drug_2_dosage: 1000mg (2 tablets of 500mg) — take at the same time as Sumatriptan
drug_2_duration: Every 6 hours as needed maximum 3 days
drug_3_dosage: 10mg — take 1 tablet at the same time as Sumatriptan to prevent vomiting
regimen_notes: Take Sumatriptan as early as possible when the headache starts.

drug_1_dosage: 400mg — take 1 tablet 3 times a day after eating morning afternoon and night
drug_2_dosage: Apply a small amount on the painful area and rub gently 3 times a day
drug_3_dosage: 20mg — take 1 capsule once a day to protect stomach from Ibuprofen
regimen_notes: Always take Ibuprofen with food. Avoid Ibuprofen if you have kidney problems.

drug_1_dosage: 75mg — take 1 small tablet once a day in the morning
drug_2_dosage: 40mg — take 1 tablet once a day at night
drug_3_dosage: 5mg — take 1 tablet once a day if blood pressure is high
drug_4_dosage: Attend physiotherapy sessions as prescribed by your therapist
regimen_notes: This patient needs hospital care. Do not give Aspirin if the stroke is due to bleeding — only if due to clot. Confirm with a doctor.

drug_1_dosage: 300mg — take 1 tablet 2 times a day morning and night
drug_2_dosage: 10mg — take 1 tablet once a day
drug_3_dosage: Take 1 tablet once a day
regimen_notes: Avoid alcohol completely. Rest and drink plenty of clean water.

drug_1_dosage: Take 4 tablets 2 times a day morning and night — must be taken with food or milk
drug_2_dosage: 500mg — take 1 tablet every 6 hours when you have fever
drug_3_dosage: Mix 1 sachet in 1 cup of clean water — drink plenty throughout the day
regimen_notes: Coartem is Uganda first-line malaria treatment. Take with fatty food or full cream milk for best absorption. Complete all 3 days even if you feel better after day 1.

drug_1_dosage: 800mg — take 1 tablet 5 times a day every 4 hours while awake
drug_2_dosage: Apply gently on the rash spots 4 times a day — do not scratch
drug_3_dosage: 500mg — take 1 tablet every 6 hours when you have fever
regimen_notes: Do not use Aspirin or Ibuprofen for fever in chicken pox — only Paracetamol. Do not scratch.

drug_1_dosage: 500mg — take 1 tablet every 6 hours when you have fever
drug_2_dosage: Mix 1 sachet in 1 cup of clean water — drink at least 8 cups a day
drug_3_dosage: 500mg — take 1 tablet 2 times a day morning and night
regimen_notes: NEVER take Aspirin or Ibuprofen for Dengue — they cause dangerous bleeding. Go to hospital if you see bleeding from gums or nose.

drug_1_dosage: 500mg — take 1 tablet 2 times a day morning and night
drug_2_dosage: 500mg — take 1 tablet every 6 hours when you have fever
drug_3_dosage: Mix 1 sachet in 1 cup of clean water and drink throughout the day
regimen_notes: Complete the full 14 days even if you feel better. Ciprofloxacin not safe in children under 12. Eat soft foods only.

drug_1_dosage: Rest at home — drink at least 8 glasses of clean water a day
drug_2_dosage: Take 1 tablet once a day
drug_3_dosage: 500mg — take 1 tablet every 6 hours if you have pain or fever — maximum 2g per day
regimen_notes: Avoid alcohol completely. Do not take more than 2g of Paracetamol per day as it stresses the liver.

drug_1_dosage: 300mg — take 1 tablet once a day at the same time every day
drug_2_dosage: 400IU — take 1 capsule once a day
drug_3_dosage: Take 1 tablet once a day
regimen_notes: Never stop Tenofovir without doctor advice. Avoid alcohol. Get all family members tested.

drug_1_dosage: 400mg — take 1 tablet once a day
drug_2_dosage: 60mg — take 1 tablet once a day
drug_3_dosage: 600mg — take 1 tablet 2 times a day with food morning and night
interaction_warning: All three drugs must be avoided in pregnancy and kidney disease
regimen_notes: Ribavirin requires strict contraception — causes birth defects. Kidney function must be checked before starting.

drug_1_dosage: 180mcg — 1 injection once a week given by a health worker
drug_2_dosage: 1000IU — take 1 tablet once a day
drug_3_dosage: Rest well drink plenty of clean fluids and eat nutritious food
regimen_notes: Hepatitis D only occurs with Hepatitis B. Refer to hospital specialist.

drug_1_dosage: Rest at home and drink plenty of clean water and fluids
drug_2_dosage: Take 1 tablet once a day
drug_3_dosage: 20mg — take 1 tablet once a day
regimen_notes: Hepatitis E is especially dangerous in pregnancy — refer to hospital immediately.

drug_1_dosage: 40mg — take 2 tablets once a day in the morning
drug_2_dosage: 100mg — take 1 tablet once a day
drug_3_dosage: Take 1 tablet once a day
regimen_notes: Stop all alcohol consumption completely and permanently. Regular liver function monitoring required.

drug_1_dosage: 600mg — take 1 tablet once a day on an empty stomach 30 minutes before eating
drug_2_dosage: 300mg — take 1 tablet once a day together with Rifampicin
drug_3_dosage: 1500mg — take 3 tablets once a day
drug_5_dosage: 25mg — take 1 tablet once a day to prevent nerve damage from Isoniazid
interaction_warning: Rifampicin turns urine orange — this is normal. Isoniazid and Pyrazinamide can stress the liver
regimen_notes: TB treatment has two phases. Stopping early causes drug-resistant TB. Avoid alcohol. Collect drugs monthly from TB clinic.

drug_1_dosage: 500mg — take 1 tablet every 6 hours when you have fever or body pain
drug_2_dosage: 10mg — take 1 tablet once a day at night for runny nose
drug_3_dosage: 500mg — take 1 tablet 2 times a day morning and night
regimen_notes: The common cold is caused by a virus — antibiotics will not help. Rest and drink plenty of fluids.

drug_1_dosage: 500mg — take 1 capsule 3 times a day morning afternoon and night
drug_2_dosage: 500mg — take 1 tablet once a day
drug_3_dosage: 500mg — take 1 tablet every 6 hours when you have fever
regimen_notes: If allergic to penicillin use Azithromycin alone for 7 days. If not improving after 48 hours go to hospital.

drug_1_dosage: Apply a small amount around the affected area 2 times a day morning and night
drug_2_dosage: 15ml — take 1 tablespoon 2 times a day to soften stool
drug_3_dosage: Sit in a basin of warm water for 15 minutes 2 times a day
regimen_notes: Eat plenty of vegetables and drink 8 glasses of water a day. Avoid straining when passing stool.

drug_1_dosage: 300mg — chew immediately then take 75mg every morning
drug_2_dosage: 40mg — take 1 tablet once a day at night
drug_3_dosage: 5mg — take 1 tablet 2 times a day morning and night
drug_4_dosage: 6.25mg — take 1 tablet 2 times a day with food
regimen_notes: This patient must go to hospital immediately. Do not stop any of these drugs without doctor advice.

drug_1_dosage: Put on in the morning before getting out of bed — wear throughout the day
drug_2_dosage: 500mg — take 1 tablet 2 times a day morning and night with food
regimen_notes: Elevate legs above heart level when resting. Exercise — walking helps. Avoid standing for long periods.

drug_1_dosage: 50mcg — take 1 tablet once a day on an empty stomach 30 minutes before breakfast
drug_2_dosage: 500mg — take 1 tablet 2 times a day with food morning and night
drug_3_dosage: 1000IU — take 1 tablet once a day
interaction_warning: Calcium reduces absorption of Levothyroxine — take them at least 4 hours apart
regimen_notes: Take Levothyroxine first in the morning on empty stomach. Check thyroid function (TSH) every 6 months.

drug_1_dosage: 10mg — take 1 tablet 3 times a day morning afternoon and night
drug_1_duration: 90 days then reduce dose as directed
drug_2_dosage: 40mg — take 1 tablet 2 times a day morning and night to slow the heart
drug_3_dosage: Take 1 tablet once a day
regimen_notes: Carbimazole can reduce white blood cells — go to hospital immediately if you develop fever or sore throat.

drug_1_dosage: Take 3 to 4 tablets immediately when you feel dizzy weak or shaky — recheck blood sugar after 15 minutes
drug_1_duration: Use immediately when symptoms appear — carry always
drug_2_dosage: Eat a small meal such as bread posho or sweet potato after recovering
drug_3_dosage: 1mg — injection given by another person if the patient is unconscious
regimen_notes: Always carry glucose tablets or sugar. Eat regular meals. If unconscious do not put anything in the mouth — use Glucagon injection.

drug_1_dosage: 500mg — take 1 tablet every 6 hours when you have pain — do not exceed 4 tablets in 24 hours
drug_2_dosage: Apply a small amount on the painful joint and rub gently 3 times a day
drug_3_dosage: 1500mg — take 1 large tablet once a day with food
regimen_notes: Use Diclofenac gel on the skin instead of Ibuprofen tablets to protect kidneys. Gentle exercise and physiotherapy help.

drug_1_dosage: 10mg — take 2 tablets once a week on the same day every week — never take daily
drug_2_dosage: 5mg — take 1 tablet once a week on a different day from Methotrexate
drug_3_dosage: 200mg — take 1 tablet 2 times a day morning and night with food
drug_4_dosage: 500mg — take 1 tablet every 6 hours when joints are painful
interaction_warning: Methotrexate and Hydroxychloroquine together require regular blood and liver monitoring
regimen_notes: NEVER take Methotrexate daily — weekly only. Regular blood tests every 3 months required. Not safe in pregnancy.

drug_1_dosage: 16mg — take 1 tablet 3 times a day morning afternoon and night with food
drug_2_dosage: 5mg — take 1 tablet 3 times a day during severe dizziness attacks
drug_3_dosage: 1000IU — take 1 tablet once a day
regimen_notes: Epley manoeuvre done by a physiotherapist is the most effective treatment for BPPV. Avoid sudden head movements.

drug_1_dosage: Apply a thin layer on the affected area once a day at night
drug_2_dosage: Apply a thin layer on pimples 2 times a day morning and night after washing face
drug_3_dosage: 100mg — take 1 tablet once a day with a full glass of water
regimen_notes: Doxycycline not safe in pregnancy or children under 12. Use sunscreen daily — Doxycycline causes sun sensitivity.

drug_1_dosage: 100mg — take 1 tablet 2 times a day after eating morning and night
drug_2_dosage: 500mg — take 1 tablet 2 times a day morning and night
drug_3_dosage: 200mg — take 1 tablet 3 times a day after eating to relieve burning pain
interaction_warning: Do not use both Nitrofurantoin and Ciprofloxacin together — use only one antibiotic
regimen_notes: Drink at least 8 glasses of water a day. Nitrofurantoin turns urine orange-red — this is normal. Complete the full course.

drug_1_dosage: Apply a thin layer on the scaly patches once a day at night
drug_1_duration: 28 days — do not use longer without doctor review
drug_2_dosage: Apply a thin layer on the patches 2 times a day morning and night
drug_3_dosage: Apply generously on dry skin 3 times a day and after bathing — keep skin moist
interaction_warning: Do not apply Clobetasol and Calcipotriol at exactly the same time — apply one in morning and one at night
regimen_notes: Do not apply Clobetasol on the face or underarms. Moisturise every day. Regular dermatologist review required.

drug_1_dosage: Apply a small amount on the sores 3 times a day morning afternoon and night
drug_2_dosage: 625mg — take 1 tablet 2 times a day with food morning and night
drug_3_dosage: Wash the affected area gently with antiseptic soap 2 times a day
regimen_notes: Wash hands before and after touching sores. Keep the child home from school until sores are healed.
